contamination_sources.legacy_window: Every local date through 2024-12-31 was available during 2022 stress review or 2023-2024 strategy development.

coverage_policy.availability: A date must have SPY bars, complete two-leg 0DTE quotes at or after 09:37, and 15:45 close quotes.
coverage_policy.integrity: Every paid raw artifact must have container and canonical-content SHA-256 metadata and pass full verification before a future run.
coverage_policy.timestamp: Signal 09:36 <= decision 09:36 <= first eligible entry quote 09:37.

integrity_metadata.note: This inventory checks committed checksum metadata only. The fixture/full integrity verification re-hashes file content.

sample_adequacy.reason: There are zero local untouched dates before signal, quote, and integrity qualification.
